name: Freddi's Fruit Cocktail Mix
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Frozen Orange Juice Concentrate (1 can)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring 4 cups sugar and 2 quarts water to a boil, stirring constantly.
2. Stir in 6 oz frozen orange juice concentrate and 6 oz frozen lemonade concentrate.
3. In a large bowl, combine all of the fruits.
4. Mix until well distributed.
5. Divide the mixed fruit into twelve 1-pint containers, leaving 1/2-inch space at the top.
6. Pour hot juice syrup over the top of each container.
7. Seal and label as Freddi's Fruit Cocktail Mix.
8. Freeze and use within 6 to 8 months.
Makes about 12 pints of mix.
Freddi's Fruit Cocktail:
Partially thaw 1 pint of FREDDI'S FRUIT COCTAIL MIX. Spoon into fruit cups. Pour ginger ale over top, if desired. Makes 4 servings.
